events.text: Written to `/app/answer.json`. Since the only photo of this box/fitting is obstructed by packaging and glare, the identifying mark and connection details needed to verify fill (314.16), conductor securing (300.14), and pull box sizing (314.28) can't be confirmed — so I called it `needs_more_info` (medium risk) rather than pass/fail, with actions to re-photograph and field-verify before close-out.
